reviews.comment:
Llevé el vehículo para el servicio y puso el filtro de habitaculo ee otro modelo y encima al revés. Tambien observe las instalaciones muy sucias! El ACA de Libertador es mucho mejor.

(Translated by Google)
I took my vehicle in for service and they installed a different model cabin air filter, and upside down at that. I also noticed the facilities were very dirty! The ACA on Libertador is much better.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDMVBEWWFREAE

reviews.comment:
El lavado bien, pero el interior lo aspiraron así nomás, encima me dejaron lleno de pelusa sobre el tablero y butacas. Un asco.

(Translated by Google)
The wash was fine, but they just vacuumed the interior, leaving lint all over the dashboard and seats. Disgusting.
